text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
<chrname> seems to have sustained a
slight injury...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But summer camp only comes around once a year,
and time is ticking. What to do...
choice_data_list: Make her take a proper rest.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I decide to concentrate fully on treatment and
recovery.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
<chrname> seems to be feeling a little
depressed because she can't get any exercise...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I decide to enthusiastically encourage
<chrname> to keep going...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But it all goes wrong! Now it seems like the injury
has gotten even worse...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And the injury is miraculously healed! Practice
goes perfectly!
